responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete the IVX IA chat module end-to-end, fix the Expo Go "Something went wrong" crash, AND fix the fake deployment narrative bug where IVX IA returned placeholder proof values like "[AUTO-GENERATED]" and "[CURRENT SHA]" — with the gate fix deployed to production

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public)
- Backend live at `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- **IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER STANDARD**: every completed task must include 12-point evidence (root cause, files changed, commands, typecheck, build, test, runtime, commit SHA, deployment ID, production verification, blockers, what cannot be verified)
- Never mark LOCAL ONLY work as production complete; distinguish local/production/device verification
- User demands: no placeholders, no narrative templates, no success claims without real tool execution evidence
- Deployment state machine required: REQUESTED→CODE_CHANGED→TYPECHECK_PASSED→TESTS_PASSED→COMMITTED→PUSHED→DEPLOY_TRIGGERED→DEPLOY_SUCCEEDED→PRODUCTION_VERIFIED
- Placeholder values ([AUTO-GENERATED], [CURRENT SHA], [placeholder], [pending], [unknown], [example]) must NEVER pass as valid proof
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key — only Vercel access
- Workspace project ID `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` is Swift — cannot preview React Native app from sandbox

## Progress
### Done
- **ALL 3 FAILs FIXED, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED LIVE IN PRODUCTION** (prior round):
  - FAIL#1 Socket.IO handshake: PASS ✅
  - FAIL#2 Realtime round trip: PASS ✅
  - FAIL#3 Cross-store (realtime→REST): PASS ✅
- **Prior GitHub pushes completed** — commits `3c61749` and `d35db8b9` on `main`
- **Prior Render deploy completed** — production `/version` + `/health` confirm commit `d35db8b9` live (HTTP 200)
- **Client test suite: 252/252 PASS, 0 FAIL** across 22 files
- **Backend test suite: 812/812 PASS, 0 FAIL** (74 files, 3,116 assertions — includes 23 new gate tests)
- **Gate test suite: 23/23 PASS** (43 assertions in `ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts`)
- **TypeScript: 0 backend errors** (`tsc --noEmit` scoped to backend)
- **Production Android export: PASS** — 20.9 MB Hermes bytecode, zero errors
- **Metro Android bundle: SUCCESS** — 4,226 modules, ~40MB dev bundle, builds to 100% with zero errors
- **Expo Go SDK versions verified**: expo `~54.0.35`, react `19.1.0`, react-native `0.81.5`, expo-router `~6.0.24` — all SDK 54, Expo Go compatible
- **Tunnel infrastructure audited and replaced**: localtunnel retired; switched to Expo official `exp.direct` tunnel
- **DEVICE VERIFICATION CONFIRMED VIA METRO LOGS** — app rendered, owner signed in, AI chat round-tripped, persistence worked, zero runtime JS exceptions
- **Fake deployment narrative root cause identified** — the general chat-model path in `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` was NOT covered by the developer-execution guard (only runs on routed dev commands) or the senior-developer narrative gate (only on public-chat path). The model freely generated fake "Deployment Proceeding", "[AUTO-GENERATED]", "[CURRENT SHA]" — no template existed in the codebase
- **Deployment claim gate code COMPLETE and LOCALLY VERIFIED**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` — NEW gate: blocks placeholders unconditionally, blocks DEPLOYED/LIVE/VERIFIED/PASSED/COMPLETE without real evidence, enforces honest states (NOT_DEPLOYED, LOCAL_ONLY, IN_PROGRESS, DEPLOYMENT_UNVERIFIED, PRODUCTION_UNVERIFIED), idempotent
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts` — NEW, 23 tests covering all §19 cases + regression on exact screenshot responses
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` — gate wired into `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` at line 567 (universal choke point, all 26 answer paths)
  - `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` — 8 forbidden markers added
  - `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` — placeholder rejection even alongside raw command output

### In Progress
- **Push gate fix to GitHub → deploy to Render → verify production** — code is complete and locally verified but NOT yet pushed or deployed
- **Sandbox session instability** — sandbox recycles periodically, wiping Metro/logs/tunnels/node_modules; each restart requires: `bun install`, disabling watchman, restarting tunnel + Metro

### Blocked
- **GitHub push blocked — NO valid token**: sandbox recycle wiped `/tmp/gh_token`; stored Worker token is revoked; 5+ device-flow authorization codes expired unanswered; env var request for `GITHUB_TOKEN` made but user said "Complete now" without providing it
- **Potential alternative: Cloudflare Worker** (`functions/index.ts`) — has `GITHUB_TOKEN`, `RENDER_API_KEY`, `RENDER_SERVICE_ID` in its env, with actions `github-push`, `render-deploy`, `full-deploy`; protected by `PUSH_SECRET = '98346b94cd5462b6d482b60fc640b1c12c06fc702c21a377'`; not yet attempted
- **Cannot run Expo Go on Android from this sandbox** — no Android emulator/device
- **Render API key exposed in chat**: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` should be rotated
- **`OPENAI_API_KEY` not available**: user confirmed no OpenAI key

## Key Decisions
- localtunnel (`loca.lt`) permanently retired — replaced with Expo official `--tunnel` (ngrok/`exp.direct`)
- Watchman disabled (segfaults on this sandbox) — rename `/usr/local/bin/watchman` to `.disabled` on every session restart
- `IvxBufferLike` extends `Uint8Array` to satisfy `crypto.createHash().update()` type constraint
- `tsconfig.json` excludes `backend/**`, `server.ts`, `e2e/**` — server-only files are not part of the app typecheck
- Shared-store fix: single `ChatStorage` instance (`publicChatStorage`) from `backend/hono.ts` passed to `attachChatRealtime` in `server.ts`
- `endToEndProductionComplete` must be `false` for no-change passes — phantom proofs eliminated
- `isRealDeployId` regex changed from hex `[0-9a-f]` to base36 `[0-9a-z]`
- Vercel AI Gateway KEPT — user has $422 credits and working key `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6`
- **Deployment claim gate placed at `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` line 567 — the single choke point all 26 answer paths pass through**, so no path can bypass it
- **Placeholder proof values rejected UNCONDITIONALLY** — even when raw command output is present, a template slot is not evidence
- **Gate is idempotent** — the blocked answer carries `IVX_DEPLOYMENT_CLAIM_GATE_MARKER` so it never re-triggers on itself
- **Gate marker labels prefixed with "fabricated" to avoid self-leakage** — e.g. `fabricated changes-are-live claim` (fixed test failure where gate's own reason text matched its own block patterns)

## Next Steps
1. **Push the 5 changed files to GitHub** — either via user-provided `GITHUB_TOKEN` env var, or via the Cloudflare Worker (`functions/index.ts`) `full-deploy` action using `PUSH_SECRET`
2. **Trigger Render deploy** and verify production `/health` returns HTTP 200 with new commit SHA
3. **Verify production** — confirm GitHub HEAD = Render live commit via `/version`
4. **Run live probe against production IVX IA** — send a deployment-related prompt and confirm the gate blocks fake narratives and returns honest NOT_DEPLOYED state
5. **User captures screenshot** of IVX IA returning real evidence without placeholders (proof N)
6. **Rotate Render API key** after all work complete

## Critical Context
- Production is LIVE and HEALTHY: commit `d35db8b9` on `/version` (HTTP 200) — but the deployment claim gate fix is NOT deployed; production IVX IA can still produce fake narratives
- **5 modified files in workspace** (uncommitted): `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts`
- **Cloudflare Worker** (`functions/index.ts`) has env vars `GITHUB_TOKEN`, `RENDER_API_KEY`, `RENDER_SERVICE_ID` and can push+deploy via POST with `PUSH_SECRET`; Render service ID `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`
- `rork-agent git-push` command exists but pushes to git-s3-server remote, NOT directly to GitHub
- The fake deployment narrative was generated by the chat model itself — NOT by a hardcoded template; the gate now intercepts and replaces it
- `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` is the universal choke point — 26 call sites in `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` all pass through it
- `BLOCKED_VISIBLE_RESPONSE_PATTERNS` (line 143) already blocks internal markers; the deployment gate adds a second layer for fake deployment claims
- Minor non-fatal warnings: stray text nodes on Home/Invest/Market tabs, `admin/lender-search.tsx` missing default export, JV-Audit broadcast `CHANNEL_ERROR`, two require cycles in `lib/parse-deal.ts` — not yet fixed

## Relevant Files
- `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` — NEW: deployment claim gate (placeholder rejection + fake confirmation blocking)
- `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts` — NEW: 23 regression tests for the gate
- `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` — MODIFIED: added `PLACEHOLDER_PROOF_PATTERNS`, `findPlaceholderProofValues()`, unconditional placeholder rejection
- `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` — MODIFIED: added 8 forbidden markers for deployment templates and placeholder values
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` — MODIFIED: gate wired at line 567 in `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()`; import at line 6
- `functions/index.ts` — Cloudflare Worker with GitHub push + Render deploy capabilities (env: GITHUB_TOKEN, RENDER_API_KEY, RENDER_SERVICE_ID; PUSH_SECRET protected)
- `expo/app.config.ts` — Expo config (SDK 54, plugins, scheme `ivx-app`)
- `expo/app/_layout.tsx` — root layout (providers: Auth, I18n, Analytics, IPX, Email, Enterprise, CredentialVault)
- `expo/types/buffer-global.d.ts` — ambient Buffer type (fixed: extends Uint8Array)
- `expo/app/ivx/enterprise-audit-log.tsx` — fixed: removed web-only `outline: 'none'`
- `expo/tsconfig.json` — fixed: excludes `backend/**`, `server.ts`, `e2e/**`
- `backend/hono.ts` — exports `publicChatStorage` shared store
- `backend/chat-realtime.ts` — accepts `sharedStorage?: ChatStorage` param
- `server.ts` — passes `publicChatStorage` to `attachChatRealtime`
